name: standards-refresh.sh walks a multi-source registry and every rule parsed from every URL is counted per source and lands in its namespace file
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r44-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && printf '

Prefer const in TypeScript source

All TypeScript files SHALL use const for variables not reassigned.

Never call eval in TypeScript

TypeScript code MUST never invoke eval on any input.

' > $OUT/a.html && printf '

Encrypt data at rest

All Terraform resources MUST enable encryption.

Log administrative access

Systems MUST log every administrative operation.

' > $OUT/b.html && printf '

Close file descriptors deterministically

Programs must close every descriptor they open.

Set request timeouts explicitly

Servers must configure explicit socket timeouts.

' > $OUT/c.html && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; grep -q 'total=3 processed=3 skipped=0 failed=0' e.err && [ "$(grep -c 'rule_count=2' e.err | tr -d ' ')" = "3" ] && N=$(cat $OUT/out/typescript/r44-ts.yaml $OUT/out/us-government/r44-gov.yaml $OUT/out/node/r44-node.yaml | grep -c '^- id:'); [ "$N" = "6" ] && echo every-parsed-rule-counted-and-filed 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
